plugin.name: Claude Code for WebStorm
plugin.description:
Claude Code for WebStorm

This plugin was entirely written by AI (Claude Opus 4.6) through conversational prompting. Every line of code was AI-generated.

A chat UI frontend for the Claude Code CLI — not a terminal wrapper. Get a proper chat interface with streaming responses, markdown rendering, and multi-session support, all without leaving your IDE.

Why This Exists

The official JetBrains Claude plugin just opens a terminal. This plugin gives you a real chat experience: your messages on the left, Claude's formatted responses on the right, with a typing animation as responses stream in character-by-character.

Features

  • Chat UI — clean message bubbles with user messages left-aligned and Claude's responses right-aligned, rendered with markdown formatting (bold, italic, code blocks)
  • Live streaming — responses type out character-by-character with a block cursor, then render as formatted markdown when complete
  • Slash command autocomplete — type / to get a popup with all 24 Claude CLI commands (/compact, /clear, /model, etc.)
  • Model selector — dropdown next to the input box to switch between Claude models on the fly (Opus, Sonnet, Haiku) without opening settings
  • Multiple sessions — create, rename, and delete separate conversations per task, with a session sidebar showing all active sessions
  • Multi-turn conversations — sessions automatically resume using the Claude CLI's --resume flag, maintaining full conversation context
  • Smart scrolling — auto-scrolls during streaming but stays put if you scroll up to read earlier messages
  • Send code to Claude — highlight code in the editor and send it with context, or reference entire files with automatic language detection
  • Floating prompt popup (Alt+Shift+C) — lightweight input near your caret for quick questions without switching to the tool window
  • Context menus — right-click in the editor or project view to send code or ask about files

How It Works

The plugin runs claude -p "prompt" --output-format stream-json --verbose as a subprocess and parses the NDJSON streaming output in real time. No API keys needed — it uses whatever authentication your Claude CLI has configured.

Requirements

  • Claude Code CLI: npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code
  • JetBrains IDE 2024.1+ (WebStorm, IntelliJ IDEA, PyCharm, etc.)

Keyboard Shortcuts

  • Ctrl+Esc — Toggle Claude Code panel
  • Alt+Shift+C — Floating prompt popup
  • Ctrl+Alt+Shift+S — Send selection to Claude
  • Ctrl+Alt+Shift+F — Ask Claude about current file
  • Ctrl+Alt+Shift+N — New session
plugin.change-notes:
v1.0.0 — Initial Release

  • Chat UI with streaming character-by-character typing animation
  • Markdown rendering for Claude's responses
  • Slash command autocomplete popup (24 commands)
  • Model selector dropdown
  • Multiple named sessions with create/rename/delete
  • Multi-turn conversation support via --resume
  • Smart auto-scrolling
  • Send code selections and file references
  • Floating prompt popup (Alt+Shift+C)
  • Editor and project view context menus
